titles.title: You Are the Pillar That Holds My Life

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: You are the pillar that holds my life You are the pillar that holds my life Master Jesus, you are the pillar that holds my life Master Jesus, you are the pillar that holds my life

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: You are the reason I live today You are the reason I live today Master Jesus, You are the reason I live today Master Jesus, You are the reason I live today

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: You are the reason I live and move You are the reason I live and move Master Jesus, You are the reason I live and move Master Jesus, You are the reason I live and move
